title: Stenolepia tristis
taxonomy: Stenolepia tristis is a species of fern within the family Dipteridaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that grows in tropical regions. The classification of Stenolepia tristis is part of the broader plant kingdom, specifically within the division Pteridophyta and class Polypodiopsida. This fern is characterized by its unique frond structure and habitat requirements. Further classification of Stenolepia tristis involves its order, family, genus, and species levels within the botanical hierarchy.
preparations: I couldn't find any information about herbal preparations for Stenolepia tristis.
intro: There is no information available on the plant "Stenolepia tristis".
